# Per host badip scoreboard (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Per host badip scoreboard. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match); `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null | alter dst_public = is_known_private_ipv4(action_remote_ip) | filter dst_public = false | join type = inner (dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip) as ioc ioc.indicator = action_remote_ip | comp count() as bad_conns, count_distinct(threat) as distinct_threats, count_distinct(action_remote_ip) as distinct_bad_ips, max(severity) as worst_severity by agent_hostname | alter host_label = coalesce(agent_hostname, "unknown-host") | alter exposure = if(worst_severity >= 90, "P1", if(worst_severity >= 70, "P2", "P3")) | filter bad_conns >= 1 | sort desc worst_severity, desc bad_conns | fields host_label, bad_conns, distinct_threats, distinct_bad_ips, worst_severity, exposure | limit 50
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (ran clean). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
